description_long: This is a brown glass beer bottle with a blue label and matching blue neck wrap. The main label features bold white text and intricate graphic elements, including circular emblems and fine print, all rendered in white and light blue. The neck of the bottle is also wrapped in blue with white text, and the cap is blue with a white rim. The bottle has a classic long-necked shape, tapering smoothly from the body to the neck. The back of the bottle is mostly covered by a solid blue label with minimal text or graphics. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually striking, with a strong emphasis on blue and white color contrasts.
description: A brown glass beer bottle with a blue and white label, blue neck wrap, and blue cap, featuring bold graphics and text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main blue label with bold white text and detailed graphics, as well as the blue neck wrap and cap.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the side of the label with partial text and some graphic elements, plus the blue neck wrap.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a solid blue label with minimal or no text, and the brown glass body is visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing the edge of the main label, some graphic elements, and the blue neck wrap.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bold blue background with white and light blue text, circular emblems, and fine graphic details. The design is modern and clean, with strong color contrast and clear, sans-serif typography.
